meta.title: Miniphage -- a Class of Satellite Phage to M13

abstractHtml: Satellite or defective bacteriophage particles can appear in extensively recycled stocks of coliphage M13. These particles, herein known as miniphage, replicate using the wild type bacteriophage as a helper. Their physical properties (u.v. spectra, sedimentation of DNA and bacteriophage, electrophoretic mobility) are described and a method for the isolation of specific satellite bacteriophage is presented.
